retry_reason: Release function always succeeds; retry would imply use-after-free since the object is freed.
contract_summary: This is the kref release callback for batadv_neigh_node. When the last reference is dropped (via batadv_neigh_node_put), this function is called to release all held references: it puts each neigh_ifinfo in the ifinfo_list, puts the hardif_neigh, puts the if_incoming, and finally frees the neigh_node via kfree_rcu. After this function returns, the neigh_node is freed and must not be accessed. The caller (via kref_put) is responsible for ensuring no further references exist. This wrapper represents the final cleanup stage of the neigh_node lifecycle.
